Alita: Battle Angel (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $85,838,210Details
International Box Office $316,061,830
Worldwide Box Office $401,900,040
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,166,556
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $19,821,388
Total $24,987,944
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When Alita awakens with no memory of who she is in a future world she does not recognize, she is taken in by Ido, a compassionate doctor who realizes that somewhere in this abandoned cyborg shell is the heart and soul of a young woman with an extraordinary past. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious history while her street-smart new friend Hugo offers instead to help trigger her memories. But it is only when the deadly and corrupt forces that run the city come after Alita that she discovers a clue to her past—she has unique fighting abilities that those in power will stop at nothing to control. If she can stay out of their grasp, she could be the key to saving her friends, her family and the world she’s grown to love.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$28,525,613 (33.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:21.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$170,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,790 opening theaters/3,802 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $112,076,598

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2019 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
February 14th, 2019 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
October 30th, 2020 (Special Engagement) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: February 1st, 2019 (Wide), released as Battle Angel La Ultima Guerrera (Mexico)
February 5th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
February 6th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
February 8th, 2019 (Wide) (Taiwan)
February 8th, 2019 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: July 9th, 2019 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi violence and action, and for some language
(Rating bulletin 2562 (Cert #51150), 1/23/2019)
Running Time: 122 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Live Action Remake, Motion Capture Performance
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Crime Boss, Cyborg, Death Sports, War
Social setting: Dystopia
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, Lightstorm Entertainment, Troublemaker Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When Alita awakens with no memory of who she is in a future world she does not recognize, she is taken in by Ido, a compassionate doctor who realizes that somewhere in this abandoned cyborg shell is the heart and soul of a young woman with an extraordinary past. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious history while her street-smart new friend Hugo offers instead to help trigger her memories. But it is only when the deadly and corrupt forces that run the city come after Alita that she discovers a clue to her past—she has unique fighting abilities that those in power will stop at nothing to control. If she can stay out of their grasp, she could be the key to saving her friends, her family and the world she’s grown to love.
